headline: PulteGroup Inc (NYSE:PHM) Fits the Peter Lynch GARP Strategy with a PEG Ratio of 0.62
summary: Discover how PulteGroup (PHM) fits Peter Lynch's GARP strategy with 18% EPS growth, a 0.62 PEG ratio, strong profitability, and a rock-solid balance sheet.
